name: IGH_ObjectProxy
summary: Provides proxy data for all Grasshopper components and parameters.

methods.name: CreateInstance
methods.summary: Create a new instance from the target object.

returns.doc: An IGH_DocumentObject instance on success or null on failure.

methods.name: DuplicateProxy
methods.summary: Create a duplicate of this proxy.

properties.name: Desc
properties.summary: Gets the Instance Description associated with this proxy.

properties.name: Exposure
properties.summary: Gets or sets the Exposure of the target object. Only set the exposure if you know what you are doing.

properties.name: Guid
properties.summary: Gets the Guid of the target object. In the case of Compiled Objects, the Guid represents the ComponentID, in the case of User Objects, the Guid is a hash of the file path.

properties.name: Icon
properties.summary: Gets the icon for this object.

properties.name: Kind
properties.summary: Gets the kind of the Proxy target object.

properties.name: LibraryGuid
properties.summary: Gets the ID of the library (GHA file) that defines this object.

properties.name: Location
properties.summary: Gets the location of the target object. If the proxy represents a Compiled Object, the location refers to the file path of the assembly, in the case of User Objects, the location refers to the object file.

properties.name: Obsolete
properties.summary: Gets whether this proxy represents an obsolete object.

properties.name: SDKCompliant
properties.summary: Gets whether this object is compliant with the current Rhino version.

properties.name: Type
properties.summary: Gets the Type for the target object. If the proxy references a User Object, the Type member will be null.
